CurrentIssues.ID: ArgumentListWrapping:TvDetailsScreen.kt$( buildString { append("Серия ${episode.number}") if (episode.title.isNotBlank()) append(". ${episode.title}") }, fontSize = 17.sp, fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold, color = Color.White, maxLines = 1, )

ArgumentListWrapping:TvDetailsScreen.kt$( buildString { append(item.year) if (includeDuration) { item.duration.averageMinutes?.toInt()?.takeIf { it > 0 }?.let { append(" · ${it / 60}ч ${it % 60}м") } } if (item.country.isNotBlank()) append(" · ${item.country}") if (item.genres.isNotEmpty()) append(" · ${item.genres.take(2).joinToString(" · ") { it.title }}") }, fontSize = 16.sp, color = Color.White.copy(alpha = 0.9f), )

ArgumentListWrapping:TvDetailsScreen.kt$( buildString { episode.durationSeconds.takeIf { it > 0 }?.let { append("${it / 60} мин") } if (isResume) append(if (length > 0) " · продолжить" else "продолжить") }, fontSize = 14.sp, color = Color.White.copy(alpha = 0.7f), )
ArgumentListWrapping:TvDetailsScreen.kt$(" · ${it / 60}ч ${it % 60}м")
ArgumentListWrapping:TvDetailsScreen.kt$("${currentEpisodes.size} ${episodesWord(currentEpisodes.size)}", color = Color.White.copy(alpha = 0.7f))

ArgumentListWrapping:TvDetailsScreen.kt$("Смотреть", onClick = onPlay, leadingIcon = Icons.Filled.PlayArrow, focusRequester = playFocus)
